title: <div><tt>#### 🔁 RECOVERED NAME BANK (original + inferred from fragments)</tt></
content:
#### 🔁 RECOVERED NAME BANK (original + inferred from fragments)

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `RE:GE` | Recursive Engine: Generative Entity |
| `SIGILENGINE` | Focus on generative spell-making |
| `R1T3` | Minimalist ritual OS |
| `T4R0S` | Tarot/recursive/symbolic OS fusion |
| `RE:SET` | Recursive Environment: Symbolic Encoding Terminal |
| `LIMINAL CORE` | Living system between states |
| `MYTHOSYNC` | Synchronization of identity, myth, and system |
| `R.I.T.U.A.L.` | Recursive Interface for Textual Utility and Language |
| `4MORPH` | Identity-shifting protocol (shapeshift engine) |
| `RE:SIGNS` | Semiotic remix engine |
| `AUTO.MYTH` | Narrative automation module |
| `4LL.G4MES` | Game + narrative + ritual unity container |

**Note:** You also referenced the desire for **"modular identity and character absorption engines"**—these appeared in some of the early RPG interface brainstorms.
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 89 (chunk 89/206)
